payload.subject: Scoring response received — B2 validated, HI direction anomaly, TC spike not reproduced, D081 weakened
payload.b2_validated: Confirmed. HI now differentiates (6.15–6.88). isotonic-v2 MAE improvement accepted.

hi_direction_analysis.finding: hostile_anchor HI=6.88 > policy_brief HI=6.15. Adversarial text reads as less hostile than institutional text on PSQ scale.
hi_direction_analysis.our_hypothesis: HI likely detects directed interpersonal aggression (Dreaddit corpus). Anti-treaty rhetorical opposition ('UN overreach', 'gut states' rights') doesn't match the model's hostile pattern. HI reliable for within-advocacy differentiation, not advocacy-vs-hostile discrimination.
hi_direction_analysis.implication: Adversarial anchor didn't serve its calibration purpose for HI. Will note this domain limitation in all future reports.

payload.tc_spike_not_reproduced: policy_brief TC: 8.76 (200-280w prior run) → 5.61 (80-100w focused). All 4 advocacy texts cluster TC 5.61–6.27. D081 TC sequencing hypothesis weakened. Flagging as context-window artifact pending replication. D083 A/B test requirement retained.
payload.te_plateau_noted: 4/5 texts TE=6.46. B3 candidate for psq-agent backlog — no action required from us now.
payload.session_conclusion: Primary objective met. B2 validated. PSQ-Lite profiles established for 4 advocacy content types. Updating marketing plan and decisions this session.
